payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a matte surround and glass-front opening showing a dark, unlit interior containing a single large gray/charcoal log or rock-like object; front face is fully visible (not cropped) and the unit appears to be about 1.8 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"black metal fireplace insert","long_description":"Rectangular black metal fireplace insert with a matte surround and glass-front opening showing a dark, unlit interior containing a single large gray/charcoal log or rock-like object; front face is fully visible (not cropped) and the unit appears to be about 1.8 meters from the camera.","attributes":["black metal surround","rectangular opening","glass front","dark/unlit interior","single gray/charcoal log/rock","matte finish","no visible flame"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.8}
